hero.title: Master university lectures with premium Q&A summaries.
hero.description: Study Hive gives students clean, high-impact lecture summaries in question and answer format, mapped from Year 1 to Year 5 for faster, deeper learning.

features.heading: Everything you need to study efficiently
features.subheading: Built for students who want clarity, speed, and consistent results.

items.title: Structured Q&A Summaries
items.description: Turn every lecture into focused questions and concise model answers for active recall.

items.title: Coverage Across 5 Academic Years
items.description: Navigate from foundational topics to capstone content with organized year-based materials.

items.title: Faster, Smarter Studying
items.description: Reduce revision time and improve exam performance with high-yield study packs.

about.heading: About Study Hive
about.paragraphOne: We built Study Hive to solve one core problem: university content is huge, but student time is limited. Our platform distills lectures into clear Q&A summaries so you can revise faster and remember longer.
about.paragraphTwo: Whether you are entering Year 1 or preparing for final-year assessments, Study Hive keeps your preparation structured, practical, and exam-focused.

items.quote: Study Hive helped me cut revision time in half while keeping my grades consistently high.
items.name: Maya R.

items.quote: The Q&A structure makes dense lectures easy to remember before exams.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.quote: It feels like having a study mentor that organizes everything for you.
items.name: Sara T.
